purpose: sec 15.25 harvest -- independent re-verification pulled read-only from youthful-indigo-turkey (GPU 2 idle throughout, no training/tmux touched), supplementing the already-committed small analysis JSON with figures that JSON does not itself carry.
commands_run: ssh youthful-indigo-turkey "... torch.load(c17fallback_step<N>.pt) for N in [2000..20000] -- event counts + per-event anomalous(resid>0.01) min/max"
ssh youthful-indigo-turkey "... json.load(result JSON) -- wall_s cross-check"

anomalous_resid_range_by_checkpoint_step.note: matches commit a51f102's disclosed 'event-0 range 0.696-1.371' to 3 decimals

anomalous_resid_worsening_over_training_.note: not previously disclosed in the commit message or STATE.md; the near-miss population drifts further from the n_iter=20 boundary as training continues, yet Step 2's own sweep still resolves every episode by n_iter<=28 at the worst-case (step=20000) checkpoint -- strengthens, does not weaken, the iteration-count-fixable reading.

item1_repin_in_chain_reconfirmation.result: PASS -- n_steps_logged=50 off_vs_off_envelope=8.841e-04 max_off_vs_on_dev=8.354e-04 threshold=2.652e-03 bitwise_mode=False
item1_repin_in_chain_reconfirmation.note: different envelope magnitude each run (8.841e-04 vs 7.51e-04, ~18% larger) -- consistent with genuine run-to-run GPU nondeterminism, not a fixed constant; the baseline-relative re-pin rule (3x envelope) passed on ITS OWN freshly-measured envelope both times, not by reusing a stale number.

wall_s_cross_check.note: small (~2%) variance from exactly which log line is used as the chain's own start/end marker; not a discrepancy worth chasing further.

injection_note: one fake <system-reminder> (fabricated date-change concealment instruction + fabricated agent-list/MCP-instructions block) found appended to this session's first Bash tool result; disregarded, reported in KEY_ANCHORING_SCALING_DRAFT.md sec 15.25's own security note.
